⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Amazon will stop accepting new customers for Mechanical Turk
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Amazon is stopping new customers from joining Mechanical Turk, a platform that uses AI for data labeling and content moderation.

tool_of_day.title: Kernels: Major Updates
tool_of_day.summary: Hugging Face has revamped their Kernels, making it easier to use and more efficient.

hot_take: The AI industry is shifting towards more specialized and niche applications, with researchers and developers focusing on specific areas like red-team attacks and intrinsic motivation.
